channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 9, 2024
item.description: The guys pick 15 games across the Bay Area, including Valley Christian at St. Ignatius, Campolindo at Clayton Valley, Half Moon Bay at San Mateo, Miramonte at Las Lomas.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: LeBron and Bronny James make history as the NBA's first father-son duo to play together
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James gave his 20-year-old son a pep talk before they rose from the Lakers bench. Amid rising cheers, they walked together to the scorer's table — and then they stepped straight into basketball history.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs acquire three-time All-Pro wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins from the Titans, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the deal tells The Associated Press the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs are acquiring three-time All-Pro wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins from the Tennessee Titans.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers legend Fernando Valenzuela dies at 63
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died. He was 63.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Murray runs for a TD, leads Cardinals to game-winning FG and 17-15 win over Chargers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Arizona's Kyler Murray rolled out to his left before turning on the jets, beating a Chargers defender to the sideline and then coasting for a spectacular 44-yard touchdown, casually holding the ball with one hand like it was a backyard game.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Monday takeaways: Kingsbury versus Waldron, injury concerns and breaking down TJ's Peanut Punch
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (WGN) — Whether it was more Caleb Williams, the Kliff Kingsbury connection, or TJ Edwards breaking down his rendition of the Peanut Punch, the Chicago Bears were back at Halas Hall Monday for walkthroughs ahead of their primetime matchup against the Washington Commanders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Want to see the Dodgers in the World Series? Prepare for sticker shock
item.description: The Boys in Blue are back in the World Series, and the matchup with the New York Yankees is sure to draw a great deal of attention. If you want to catch a game in person, however, it will also cost you a great deal of cash.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Kucherov scores with 55 seconds left for 4-3 win over Vegas
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored the winning goal with less than a minute to play just 1:27 after Brandon Hagel had tied it and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Las Vegas Strip stadium, resort detailed in county documents; new Athletics ballpark revealed
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation
